title: Lead Instructional Designer at Amity University

jsonLd.title: Lead Instructional Designer at Amity University
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Amity University. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Instructional Designer to strengthen our Allahabad-based team.

About Amity University:
Amity University is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Communication Skills

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Referral bonus program
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Amity University!
